feed.title: 9GAG
feed.subtitle: Hot posts from 9gag.com (no native feed; parsed from the page's window._config JSON). NSFW posts are tagged [NSFW].

entry.title: Toe-tally killing it.
The Jackass: Best and Last drone show delivered exactly the kind of chaos you hope for.
Years pass. Friendships remain. The chaos stays exactly the same.
The past is lost. The past is a lie
A gif(t) for you

Be doesn't even know the moon is bigger than earth
Daily Cat Picture
Classic toddler logic at its finest
It do be like that tho...
The quiver in his voice
No stereotypes were harmed, making this video
Spot the legendary Greek Warrior
He did everything for her, sacrificed his career, even donated his blood, paid for her treatments, but in the end she left him because she wanted to "discover herself"
Only the really smart people knows the answer...
Who even watched that shit?
Dont google it
I was saved
Its 1450 downvotes by now
This was cool admit it

Celebrating
I thought maybe someone out there needed this
Haters will say it's A.I.
Oxford mathematician reveals a fast way to tie your shoes y'inquisition
Level of wealth money cannot buy

43rd bday and wife and son didn’t even get me a 50 cent card or even a text message. I’m always expected to spend thousands of dollars on them on holiday and bdays. Not anymore. At least I got my 9gag degenerates. Fock you and see you tomorrow
Safety is number one priority
"They're eating the dogs. The people that came in they're eating the cats. They're eating the pets of the people that live there."
Indian yeet kid 2026 meme
You ready?
When you date a farmer girl
Maybe his football team lost
You've gotta pump them up!

Little dude just bailed on everything
Finally a Ship That Won’t Sink... in My Living Room
No Ticket needed???
I can't keep up with the indians wtf moments anymore
